command: /bin/zsh -lc './.venv/bin/python -m pytest -q sympy/core/tests'

/bin/zsh -lc "./.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
from sympy import *
from sympy.core.cache import clear_cache
import traceback

clear_cache()
x, y, z = symbols('x y z', real=True)
expr = exp(sinh(Piecewise((x, y > x), (y, True)) / z))
print('sympy', __import__('sympy').__version__)
print('expr:', expr)
try:
    print(expr.subs({1: 1.0}))
except Exception:
    traceback.print_exc()
PY"

/bin/zsh -lc "./.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
from sympy import *
from sympy.core.cache import clear_cache
import traceback

for zreal in (False, True):
    clear_cache()
    x,y=symbols('x y', real=True)
    z=symbols('z', real=zreal) if zreal else symbols('z')
    pw=Piecewise((x,y>x),(y,True))
    a=pw/z
    print('\\nzreal',zreal,'pw real?',pw.is_real,'arg real?',a.is_real)
    print('pw as ri',pw.as_real_imag())
    try:
      ri=a.as_real_imag()
      print('a ri',ri)
      im=ri[1]
      print('im class',type(im),'im=',im)
      print('im/pi:',im/pi)
      print('construct mod...')
      m=Mod(im,pi)
      print('mod=',m,'zero?',m.is_zero)
    except Exception:
      traceback.print_exc()
PY"

/bin/zsh -lc "./.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
from sympy import *
from sympy.core.cache import clear_cache
import traceback

for zreal in (False, True):
    clear_cache()
    x,y=symbols('x y', real=True)
    z=symbols('z', real=zreal) if zreal else symbols('z')
    pw=Piecewise((x,y>x),(y,True))
    a=pw/z
    print('\\nzreal',zreal,'pw real?',pw.is_real,'arg real?',a.is_real)
    print('pw as ri',pw.as_real_imag())
    try:
      ri=a.as_real_imag()
      print('a ri',ri)
      im=ri[1]
      print('im class',type(im),'im=',im)
      print('im/pi:',im/pi)
      print('construct mod...')
      m=Mod(im,pi)
      print('mod=',m,'zero?',m.is_zero)
    except Exception:
      traceback.print_exc()
PY"

/bin/zsh -lc "./.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
from sympy import exp, Piecewise, sinh, symbols
from sympy.core.cache import clear_cache

clear_cache()
x, y, z = symbols('x y z', real=True)
p = Piecewise((x, y > x), (y, True))
expr = exp(sinh(p/z))
try:
    got = expr.subs({1: 1.0})
except Exception as exc:
    import traceback
    traceback.print_exc()
else:
    print('got:', got)
    print('expected structural:', exp(sinh(p/z**1.0)))
    print('equal:', got == exp(sinh(p/z**1.0)))
PY"

/bin/zsh -lc "./.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
from sympy import Piecewise, symbols
x, y = symbols('x y', real=True)
z = symbols('z')
p = Piecewise((x, y > x), (y, True))/z
for i in range(3):
    try:
        print(i, p % 1)
    except Exception as exc:
        print(i, type(exc).__name__, exc)
PY
